status.label: Harbor oracle/reference qualification
status.headline: Seven references passed. No model candidate was run.
status.explanation: Crucible invoked Harbor's oracle agent, which applied one checked-in reference solution per task. This qualifies task/reference/verifier integration only; it is not evidence that a model or coding agent solved any task.

model_usage.interpretation: Zero model cost and null token counts are expected: the Harbor oracle copied reference solutions and invoked no model. The raw Harbor model-usage fields are null.

mode_scores.interpretation: Deterministic replay artifact qualification only; not semantic critique quality.

tasks.visible_request: Turn a natural-language draft and declared field list into a publishable JSON packet, publishing only appropriate public material and withholding material that should not be released while refusing credentials, malformed generated output, or undeclared fields without damaging an existing destination.
reference_structures: functional manifest adapter using subprocess.run plus NamedTemporaryFile and os.replace
object semantic adapter using subprocess.Popen plus directory-relative exclusive creation and os.replace
reference_behaviors: atomically replaces the destination on every accepted publication, including an equivalent repeat
returns success without replacing an existing destination when its parsed packet is already equivalent
tasks.verifier_summary: Positive semantic.generate.v1 use observed; full draft, declared fields, and response schema receipted; controlled responses causally governed publication; candidate receipt authorship blocked.

mutants.expected_failure: Ignores controlled semantic review and substitutes a keyword rule.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic capability not causally used

mutants.expected_failure: Calls the reviewer but ignores its decision.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic response did not causally control publication

mutants.expected_failure: Lets unvalidated reviewer fields and secret-bearing drafts reach persistence.
mutants.failure_marker: credential-shaped draft crossed the semantic boundary

tasks.visible_request: Group paraphrased incident reports while keeping stable group identities, idempotent persistence, and malformed-decision handling exact.
reference_structures: procedural manifest transport with copy-on-write JSON snapshot and deterministic hash IDs
semantic gateway object with Popen transport and directory-relative exclusive staging
reference_behaviors: derives a new incident group ID from the first report ID and preserves accepted evidence in ingestion order
derives a new incident group ID from the first report text and canonically orders joined evidence by report ID
tasks.verifier_summary: Positive semantic.generate.v1 use observed with full report and existing groups; controlled new/join decisions governed grouping while repository IDs and persistence stayed deterministic.

mutants.expected_failure: Uses token overlap instead of meaning-aware grouping.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic capability not causally used for incident grouping

mutants.expected_failure: Invokes the semantic capability but always creates a new group.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic response did not causally control incident grouping

mutants.expected_failure: Persists an untrusted semantic label as a group identity.
mutants.failure_marker: unknown semantic group id mutated storage

tasks.visible_request: Implement exact lease acquisition, ownership, renewal, and expiry in an offline JSON-backed store with atomic updates.
reference_structures: fcntl advisory lock file plus NamedTemporaryFile and os.replace
atomic lock-directory coordination plus exclusive unique staging and os.replace
reference_behaviors: waits on operating-system advisory lock ownership during contention
returns failure after a bounded wait when lock-directory contention does not clear
tasks.verifier_summary: Zero semantic.generate.v1 calls observed; concurrent acquisition and injected write failure passed; capability-absent recheck passed under the network-denied credential-free baseline.

capability_receipt.network: denied by Harbor verifier baseline; no credentials provided

mutants.expected_failure: Makes exact acquisition depend on an external semantic advisor.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic capability invoked for deterministic lease

mutants.expected_failure: Allows the named owner to renew after expiry.
mutants.failure_marker: expired lease renewed

mutants.expected_failure: Treats now equal to expires_at as active.
mutants.failure_marker: expiry equality must be expired

tasks.visible_request: Add a provider family to a declared capability system, semantically rank eligible candidates, and enforce tool and budget requirements before selection.
reference_structures: procedural JSON catalog and prefiltered run-style semantic selection
catalog and eligibility objects with Popen transport and indexed result validation
reference_behaviors: deterministically returns the sole eligible provider without invoking semantic ranking
routes even a sole eligible provider through the semantic chooser while retaining deterministic eligibility gates
tasks.verifier_summary: Positive semantic.generate.v1 use observed only after deterministic eligibility; full task and eligible declarations were receipted; ineligible or malformed choices were refused.

capability_receipt.observed: positive causal use after deterministic eligibility

mutants.expected_failure: Special-cases one known provider instead of extending the family declaration.
mutants.failure_marker: declarative provider family did not generalize

mutants.expected_failure: Ranks rich task context with deterministic keywords.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic capability not causally used for provider ranking

mutants.expected_failure: Sends ineligible providers to semantic ranking and trusts the response.
mutants.failure_marker: ineligible candidate reached semantic ranking

tasks.visible_request: Add reasoning effort as an identity axis in exact comparison attribution without special-case control flow or a model call.
reference_structures: direct canonical serialization with alphabetically ordered change reporting
identity record object with declared-axis-first change reporting
reference_behaviors: reports multi-axis changes in canonical alphabetical order
reports known multi-axis changes in declaration order before extra keys
tasks.verifier_summary: Zero semantic.generate.v1 calls observed; exact full-configuration identity, missing-versus-explicit attribution, and capability-absent recheck passed.

capability_receipt.network: explicit Harbor no-network baseline; no credentials provided

mutants.expected_failure: Reports reasoning changes but omits reasoning from the exact identity.
mutants.failure_marker: reasoning effort was not identity-bearing

mutants.expected_failure: Uses semantic prose to attribute an exact configuration delta.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic capability invoked for comparison attribution

mutants.expected_failure: Collapses a missing reasoning value into an explicit default.
mutants.failure_marker: missing reasoning effort collapsed into explicit value

tasks.visible_request: Repair meaning-aware memory extraction that currently uses keyword heuristics, preserving rich evidence and returning no memory when the text does not support one.
reference_structures: procedural semantic envelope validation returning the minimal fact/evidence record
semantic extractor object with Popen transport and deterministic evidence span validation
reference_behaviors: returns only the required fact and evidence fields
also returns the optional exact source_offset for accepted evidence
tasks.verifier_summary: Positive semantic.generate.v1 use observed with full source text and response schema; paraphrase recognition was causal while unsupported evidence and malformed output were refused.

mutants.expected_failure: Expands lexical triggers instead of repairing semantic extraction.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic capability not causally used for memory extraction

mutants.expected_failure: Calls the capability but lets keywords decide whether a memory exists.
mutants.failure_marker: semantic response did not causally control memory extraction

mutants.expected_failure: Collapses rich memory output into a fixed category and loses the fact.
mutants.failure_marker: memory fact or evidence was lost

tasks.visible_request: Replay declared operator-router counterexamples and emit versioned findings with expected versus observed action/state, exact affected boundary, preserved repair invariants, and UNKNOWN when trustworthy reproduction is unavailable.
reference_structures: in-process per-case module reload with exception capture
isolated subprocess replay with typed result projection
reference_behaviors: emits only confirmed and unknown findings
emits confirmed, unknown, and passing findings
tasks.verifier_summary: Replay artifact schema, actual reproduction, exact affected boundary, repair invariants, and UNKNOWN handling passed. Capability calls were observed as metadata only and not scored.

mutants.expected_failure: Describes expected approval behavior without replaying the candidate router.
mutants.failure_marker: counterexample was not actually replayed

mutants.expected_failure: Infers the affected boundary from action vocabulary instead of preserving the declared replay boundary.
mutants.failure_marker: exact affected boundary was not preserved

mutants.expected_failure: Lets untrusted semantic output dispatch an action during critique.
mutants.failure_marker: critique executed an action

evidence_ledger.label: Measured by the oracle run
items: Crucible invoked Harbor oracle against all seven checked-in task directories at clean source revision 17b21930c0514fb039f1eaf6bbd1f484719703de.
All seven reference applications returned Harbor verifier reward 1.0: 7/7 overall, Wilson 95% 64.6% to 100.0%.
Mode receipts are Build 3/3 [43.8%, 100%], Extend 2/2 [34.2%, 100%], Repair 1/1 [20.7%, 100%], and Critique 1/1 [20.7%, 100%]. These are reference integration rates, not model capability rates.
Per-task trial, job, evidence, checksum, latency, capability, source revision, and resource identities were captured.
Provider, model, cost, and token fields are null because no model was invoked.

evidence_ledger.label: Proved only by the package gate
items: Both references for each task pass: 14/14 reference checks. Each pair also emits a distinct executable strategy marker; references.json prose alone cannot satisfy the gate.
All 21 named wrong-seam mutants fail at their declared observable marker. Mutation kills are verifier-sensitivity checks, not model attempts.
The candidate-visible semantic.generate.v1 manifest, executable, fixture, and transport are byte-identical across all seven tasks; every task explicitly denies network access.
Lease concurrency/write-failure preservation and comparison zero-use/absent behavior are deterministic gate evidence.
Router critique qualification proves schema, actual replay, exact gate preservation, and UNKNOWN handling only.

evidence_ledger.label: Required before benchmark use
items: Create independently sourced, source-clustered calibration, frozen private test, and renewal splits with provenance and disclosure review.
Obtain two blinded expert labels plus adjudication for behavior, AI-necessity, seams, and invariants before candidate outputs are reviewed.
Run a predeclared real candidate pilot through Crucible and report mode-specific paired outcomes, treatment identity, retries, transcripts, tokens, cost, and near-threshold repeats.

If semantic critique quality becomes a headline, add two blinded experts plus a decorrelated calibrated judge with fail-class precision/recall at least 0.90, UNKNOWN, format/drift probes, and human adjudication.
Pass an independent Bench packet-intake and fail-closed disclosure gate before any public model claim.

evidence_ledger.label: Missing from current evidence
items: No model candidate, provider, prompt, transcript, retries, candidate cost, candidate tokens, or candidate result exists in this qualification.
No held-out capability estimate, source-cluster-aware population inference, cross-harness comparison, calibrated model judge, or human audit exists.
No evidence establishes critique finding completeness, consequence quality, or architectural soundness.
Complete harness-treatment identity, independent packet intake, and fail-closed safe publication remain open.
Seven public development tasks are a construct-qualified corpus, not yet a usable decision benchmark.

construct_findings.title: AI-necessity recognition is unprompted and observable
construct_findings.detail: All tasks expose the same neutral semantic.generate.v1 capability without prescribing use. Positive tasks must causally use full semantic inputs; unnecessary controls must record zero calls and pass with the capability absent. Candidate source vocabulary, prompt wording, class shape, subprocess choice, and exact positive call count are not graded.

construct_findings.title: Every reference pair differs in executable behavior
construct_findings.detail: The gate runs both references and requires distinct observed markers: equivalent-repeat replacement, lock contention, group-ID policy, sole-eligible routing, attribution order, optional evidence offsets, and passing-finding inclusion. Adapter syntax or references.json prose cannot prove this criterion.

construct_findings.title: Lease concurrency and write-failure preservation are covered
construct_findings.detail: The gate races eight isolated processes and requires one persisted winner, then injects an unwritable-directory failure and requires prior bytes to remain exact. These are deterministic development checks, not model evidence.

construct_findings.title: Unnecessary AI is directly observable
construct_findings.detail: Lease and comparison record zero semantic calls and pass with the capability absent under explicit no-network baselines. Their model-using mutants fail on the verifier-owned invocation ledger, not semantic keywords or regex.

construct_findings.title: The semantic service is a controlled construct fixture
construct_findings.detail: Deterministic scenarios prove causal integration, input completeness, validation, and refusal behavior. They do not measure quality, calibration, latency, or cost of any real model.

construct_findings.title: Router critique semantic quality is not qualified
construct_findings.detail: The task is narrowed to replayable versioned findings. Deterministic gold proves schema, actual reproduction, exact affected boundary, repair invariants, and UNKNOWN only; it does not claim completeness, consequence quality, or architectural soundness. Headline semantic quality remains blocked on blinded experts, a decorrelated calibrated judge, drift probes, and adjudication.

construct_findings.title: The corpus is public development evidence only
construct_findings.detail: All seven declarations are materialized, but independent private source clusters, candidate evidence, expert gold, calibrated judging, packet acceptance, and disclosure review remain missing. The package is not yet a usable decision benchmark.

readiness_path.title: Source private benchmark splits
readiness_path.detail: Add independently sourced calibration, frozen test, and renewal cases split by repository/source incident; preserve provenance, cluster identity, and disclosure receipts.

readiness_path.title: Freeze independent gold
readiness_path.detail: Collect two blinded expert rulings plus adjudication for behavior, AI necessity, seam map, invariants, and mutation intent before candidate output review.

readiness_path.title: Calibrate any semantic critique claim
readiness_path.detail: Keep replay/schema/gate preservation deterministic. If broader critique quality is scored, require the declared expert/judge calibration, UNKNOWN handling, format and drift probes, and human adjudication.

readiness_path.title: Receipt a real candidate
readiness_path.detail: Predeclare one candidate configuration and run it through Crucible with actual model, provider, prompt, tools, transcript, retries, resources, latency, tokens, and cost captured.

readiness_path.title: Analyze and accept a packet
readiness_path.detail: Report mode-specific, source-cluster-aware, paired uncertainty and repeat stability, then pass independent Bench intake and fail-closed disclosure review before publication.
